summary: Iteration 58 - Avatar Accuracy Agent with Gemini Vision comparison. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Marketing AI Studio loads correctly with all components including Presenter Avatar section, Video Mode options (No Video, Narration, Presenter), and campaign creation workflow.

BACKEND_1_accuracy_endpoint_post.details: Accepts source_image_url, company_name, max_iterations (max 3). Returns job_id for polling. Model AvatarAccuracyRequest validated.

BACKEND_2_accuracy_endpoint_get.details: Returns job status with iterations array, score, feedback, passed fields. Invalid job_id returns 404.

BACKEND_3_accuracy_generation_logic.details: Background thread uses _describe_person for vision description, _gemini_edit_image for avatar generation, _accuracy_compare for Gemini Vision comparison. Loops up to max_iterations (max 3) to improve quality based on feedback.

BACKEND_4_accuracy_compare_function.details: Compares source photo with generated avatar using Gemini Vision. Returns score (1-10), feedback string, passed boolean (true if score >= 7). Robust JSON parsing with regex fallback.

BACKEND_5_video_preview_still_works.details: Existing endpoints verified working. POST returns job_id, GET returns status and video_url when complete.

BACKEND_6_preview_texts_shortened.details: PREVIEW_TEXTS shortened for 5-second videos. Each language text under 15 words.

FRONTEND_1_pipeline_view_loads.details: Marketing AI Studio loads without errors. Contains Campaign Name, Briefing, and all questionnaire fields.

FRONTEND_2_presenter_avatar_section.details: Presenter Avatar section visible with 'No avatar yet' placeholder when no avatar created.

FRONTEND_3_video_mode_options.details: Video Mode section displays three options: No Video (faster), Narration (Voice + scenes), Presenter (Talking avatar).

FRONTEND_4_avatarMediaTab_state.details: avatarMediaTab state variable exists for Photo/Video toggle. Default value 'photo'.

FRONTEND_5_accuracyProgress_state.details: accuracyProgress state variable tracks accuracy generation progress with iteration, progress, iterations fields.

FRONTEND_6_photo_video_selector.details: Photo/Video toggle appears in avatar frame when video preview exists. Uses data-testid='media-tab-photo' and 'media-tab-video'.

FRONTEND_7_avatar_save_includes_video_ur.details: saveAvatarAndClose and saveAvatarAsNew functions include video_url field from previewVideoUrl state.

keys_verified: studio.regenerate_preview (en: 'Regenerate Preview', pt: 'Regenerar Preview', es: 'Regenerar Preview')

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58: Avatar Accuracy Agent uses Gemini Vision to compare source photos with generated avatars. POST /generate-avatar-with-accuracy starts async job (returns job_id), GET polls for status. Response includes iterations array with score (1-10), feedback, passed (true if score >= 7) fields. Loops up to 3 times to improve quality. Frontend: avatarMediaTab state (line 903) for Photo/Video toggle, accuracyProgress state (line 904) for progress tracking. Photo/Video selector appears at lines 2159-2207 when video exists. Avatar save includes video_url field. PREVIEW_TEXTS shortened for 5-second videos. Translation keys photo_tab, video_tab, accuracy_evolution, regenerate_preview exist in all 3 locales.

_run_accuracy_generation_function.description: Background thread that: 1) Downloads source image, 2) Gets vision description via _describe_person, 3) Loops up to max_iterations generating avatar via _gemini_edit_image, 4) Compares with _accuracy_compare, 5) Uses feedback to improve next iteration if score < 7

_accuracy_compare_function.description: Uses Gemini Vision to compare source and avatar. Returns {score: 1-10, feedback: str, passed: bool}. Robust JSON parsing with regex fallback for malformed responses.

texts: pt: 'Olá! Sou seu apresentador virtual, pronto para representar sua marca!'
en: 'Hello! I'm your virtual presenter, ready to represent your brand!'
es: '¡Hola! Soy tu presentador virtual, listo para representar tu marca!'

frontend_video_url_in_avatar_save.description: video_url field included in saved avatar data from previewVideoUrl state
